productDisplayName: Carlton London Men Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: Give your casual style a practical, peppy edge with this pair of leather and canvas hi-ankle shoes from carlton london. The white, welted lining makes this pair stand apart from other casual shoes.UpperLeather upper with a canvas wraparound for breathable comfort, easy maintenance and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded fabric footbed for all-day, sweat-free comfortHigh ankle for enhanced support to the lower leg, and styleMidsoleEVA midsole for durability and comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole, strategically grooved for absolute grip and tractionshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain the leather upperTo clean the canvas part, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water. Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush and wash off with lukewarm water
